# Environment & configuration

Every setting consumed by the application. Source of truth is
`src/common/settings.Settings` (subclasses `CoreSettings`); the
table below is regenerated by `scripts/dump_settings_schema.py`.

Resolution order (highest → lowest):

1. AWS Secrets Manager (when `AWS_SECRET_NAME` is set)
2. Environment variables
3. `.env` file (gitignored)
4. Field defaults

Do not hand-edit the table between the `BEGIN AUTO` / `END AUTO`
markers — run the script instead. Hand-written prose around the
markers is preserved.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO: settings table — generated by scripts/dump_settings_schema.py -->

|---|---|---|---|---|

| `aws_secret_name` | `str | None` | — | `None` |  |
